title: Registry-driven MCP facade
goal: Refactor the existing MCP server toward shared registries and add safe read-only resources for skills, tools and module capabilities.
requirements: Keep the existing MCP endpoint mounted at /mcp.
Add safe resources for skills, tools and module capabilities.
Do not expose secrets, PII, raw paths or gateway tokens in resources.
Preserve existing MCP tools during the refactor.
Where safe, derive tool/resource descriptions from existing registries instead of duplicating text.
Do not open external deployment/auth scope in this task.
acceptance: MCP server still starts with the agent runtime.
MCP resources are available for registered skills and tool descriptions.
Existing MCP tools continue to call Django gateway.
README documents that MCP is an external facade, not the internal sidebar transport.
